aiSettings.title: AI Automation
aiSettings.subtitle: AI watches your CRM 24/7 — spots overdue items, drafts reminders, answers tickets. You decide what to delegate.
aiSettings.heroAnalyticsDesc: Sends morning briefing, detects anomalies, scores leads. Makes no changes.
aiSettings.heroShadowDesc: Drafts actions — reminders, follow-ups. Nothing is sent without your approval.
aiSettings.heroLiveDesc: Sends messages and creates tasks automatically. Enable only after validating shadow mode.
aiSettings.modeReviewDesc: AI drafts the action — you approve
aiSettings.scenarioAckDesc: When a ticket nears its SLA deadline, AI replies to the customer so it's not missed
aiSettings.scenarioFollowupDesc: If a deal has no activity for 7+ days, AI creates a task to reach out
aiSettings.scenarioPaymentDesc: Overdue invoices automatically enter the reminder journey
aiSettings.dailyBriefingDesc: Morning digest with stale deals, SLA risks, overdue invoices
aiSettings.anomalyDetectionDesc: Detect ticket spikes, large invoices, engagement drops
aiSettings.leadScoringDesc: Enhanced scoring: email quality, title, source history, engagement
aiSettings.autoAcknowledgeShadowDesc: Auto-respond to tickets approaching SLA — shadow mode
aiSettings.autoFollowupShadowDesc: Create tasks for stale deals (>7 days no activity) — shadow mode
aiSettings.paymentReminderShadowDesc: Enroll overdue invoices in reminder journey — shadow mode
aiSettings.autoAcknowledgeLiveDesc: Auto-respond to tickets — LIVE mode, sends real messages
aiSettings.autoFollowupLiveDesc: Create tasks for stale deals — LIVE mode
aiSettings.paymentReminderLiveDesc: Enroll overdue invoices — LIVE mode, sends real emails
aiSettings.shadowActionsDesc: Actions AI would take — review and approve before enabling live mode
aiSettings.shadowPaymentReason: {days} days overdue. Will enroll in payment reminder journey.
aiSettings.shadowAcknowledgeReason: SLA {percent}% elapsed, no response yet. Will send auto-acknowledgment to customer.
aiSettings.shadowFollowupReason: {days} days without activity. Will create a follow-up task.
aiSettings.failedRetry: Failed to load — click to retry
aiSettings.deliveryChannelsDesc: Configure where daily briefing and alerts are delivered
aiSettings.emailDeliveryDesc: Sent to all admin and manager users automatically
aiSettings.shadowPaymentDetail: The customer will receive an email reminder. Sequence: 3 emails, 3 days apart. If payment arrives, the sequence stops automatically.
aiSettings.shadowAckDetail: An automatic acknowledgment is sent to the customer — this resets the SLA timer and gives the team time for a full response.
aiSettings.shadowFollowupDetail: A task is created for the deal owner: contact the customer and update the deal status. The deal is not closed automatically.
aiSettings.statsEmptyHint: No data yet — enable features with the "Review" badge to let AI start drafting actions
aiSettings.previewDailyBriefing:
Every day at 08:00 you receive an email:

📊 Deals: 3 moving, 2 stale
⚠️ SLA: 2 tickets near breach
💰 Finance: 1 invoice 5 days overdue
✅ Suggested: reach out to ACME Corp
aiSettings.previewAnomalyDetection:
Instant alert in Telegram/Slack when:
• Ticket spike >5 in an hour
• Outlier invoice (>$10k for a new customer)
• Engagement drop of 40%+
aiSettings.previewLeadScoring:
Every new lead gets a 0-100 score:
• Corporate email +20
• C-level title +25
• Referral source +15
• Open rate >50% +40
aiSettings.telegramHelpTitle: How to get Bot Token and Chat ID
aiSettings.telegramHelpStep2: 2. Give your bot a name — BotFather will send back a Bot Token (long string with a colon)
aiSettings.telegramHelpStep3: 3. Send /start to your new bot, then open @userinfobot — it will show your Chat ID
aiSettings.slackHelpTitle: How to get the Webhook URL
aiSettings.slackHelpStep1: 1. Go to api.slack.com/apps → Create New App → From scratch
aiSettings.slackHelpStep2: 2. In the app settings choose Incoming Webhooks → Activate
aiSettings.slackHelpStep3: 3. Add New Webhook to Workspace → pick a channel → copy the URL
aiSettings.budgetHelpBody: AI pays for Claude/GPT API calls — generating briefings, analyzing deals, drafting messages. The daily limit protects against unexpected costs.
aiSettings.budgetHelpTypical: Typical usage: $0.50–$5 per day per company.
aiSettings.autoRenewalShadowDesc: AI drafts a renewal email — you approve sending
aiSettings.autoRenewalLiveDesc: AI auto-sends the proposal and creates a deal in PROPOSAL stage
aiSettings.scenarioRenewalDesc: 30 days before contract end, AI drafts a proposal email with a new price and creates a deal in PROPOSAL stage
aiSettings.shadowRenewalReason: {days} days until end. Proposed {uplift} over current price.
aiSettings.shadowRenewalDetail: A proposal email (AI-drafted) is sent to the customer. A deal "Renewal — <company>" is created in PROPOSAL stage with probability 60%.
aiSettings.autoHotLeadShadowDesc: Lead with score ≥80 → reassign to senior manager — you approve
aiSettings.autoHotLeadLiveDesc: Auto-reassigns hot leads to seniors, raises priority, sends notification
aiSettings.scenarioHotLeadDesc: When a lead score crosses 80, AI suggests reassigning to a senior manager (admin/manager) via round-robin
aiSettings.shadowHotLeadDetail: Lead will be reassigned to the senior manager, priority raised to "high", they'll get a CRM + email notification. The previous owner stays in activity history.
aiSettings.autoTriageShadowDesc: New tickets → AI suggests category, priority, tags — you approve
aiSettings.autoTriageLiveDesc: Automatically applies AI-suggested category/priority/tags to new tickets
aiSettings.scenarioTriageDesc: For new tickets, AI reads subject/description and assigns category (billing/technical/complaint/…), priority (low/medium/high/urgent) and tags
aiSettings.shadowTriageDetail: The ticket will be updated with AI-suggested category, priority and tags. Existing tags will be replaced. If classification is wrong — just Reject; the ticket stays as-is.
aiSettings.autoStageAdvanceShadowDesc: Stuck high-probability deals → suggest next pipeline stage
aiSettings.autoStageAdvanceLiveDesc: Automatically advances stuck high-probability deals to the next pipeline stage
aiSettings.scenarioStageAdvanceDesc: Deals with probability ≥60% stuck in current stage ≥14 days → suggest advancing to the next pipeline stage
aiSettings.shadowStageAdvanceDetail: The deal will move to the next pipeline stage. stageChangedAt resets. If the move is premature — Reject; the deal stays put.
aiSettings.autoSentimentShadowDesc: AI detects angry/threatening tone → suggest senior escalation — you approve
aiSettings.autoSentimentLiveDesc: Automatically escalates tickets with high negative sentiment to a senior manager
aiSettings.scenarioSentimentDesc: AI classifies ticket sentiment (positive/neutral/negative_low/negative_high). On negative_high with confidence ≥70% — suggests senior escalation, priority=urgent, notification
aiSettings.shadowSentimentDetail: Ticket is reassigned to a senior (admin/manager), priority=urgent, escalationLevel=1, they get a CRM notification with key phrases. Churn protection.
aiSettings.autoKbCloseShadowDesc: Ticket semantically matches a KB article → suggest close with link — you approve
aiSettings.autoKbCloseLiveDesc: Automatically closes tickets that AI confidently matches to a KB article (confidence ≥80%)
aiSettings.scenarioKbCloseDesc: New ticket → AI compares against published KB articles. On confidence ≥80% suggests closing with a link to the article
aiSettings.shadowKbCloseDetail: A public comment with the article link is added, ticket.status=resolved, firstResponseAt=now. If the customer replies, the ticket will reopen.
aiSettings.autoDuplicateShadowDesc: New contact with same email/phone → suggest merging with existing — you approve
aiSettings.autoDuplicateLiveDesc: Automatically merges duplicate contacts (same email or same phone)
aiSettings.scenarioDuplicateDesc: New contacts are checked for email/phone/fullName overlap with existing ones. On match — suggests merge (keep older, deactivate newer)
aiSettings.shadowDuplicateDetail: All Deals/Tickets/Activities from the new contact are re-linked to the older one. The new contact is deactivated (isActive=false, tag=merged_duplicate). Data is not deleted — just hidden.

aiActions.title: AI Actions
aiActions.subtitle: Actions AI has prepared for customers — review and approve before they run. Clicking Approve sends the email / creates the task / updates the CRM.

tips.ctrlKDesc: Search deals, contacts, tickets, companies — all from keyboard. No mouse needed.
tips.wallpaperDesc: Click the wallpaper icon in the header — set a video background. Each user picks their own.
tips.dailyBriefingDesc: Every day at 8 AM: stale deals, SLA risks, overdue invoices, churn signals — delivered to email.
tips.anomalyDesc: 5 tickets from one company in a day? Unusual invoice amount? Engagement drop? AI catches it and alerts you.
tips.widgetDesc: Sales sees pipeline, Support sees tickets, Finance sees AR. Toggle widgets per role.
tips.dealDragDesc: Drag a deal card between Kanban columns — stage changes and win probability recalculates automatically.
tips.dealRottingDesc: Deals >14 days without activity get highlighted. AI creates a follow-up task in shadow mode.
tips.dealWeightedDesc: "Weighted" = each deal × probability. Big gap from Total? Too many low-probability deals.
tips.dealCloseTitle: Overdue close date hurts AI score
tips.dealCloseDesc: Past-due expected close date = -10 to AI win probability. Update it to keep forecasts accurate.
tips.dealTeamDesc: Closer, consultant, engineer — each team member sees the deal in 'My Deals'.
tips.dealCompDesc: Competitors tab: name, product, strengths, weaknesses. Know your enemy.
tips.ticketShortDesc: On any ticket: R=reply, N=internal note, A=assign to me, E=escalate, J/K=next/prev.
tips.ticketMacroDesc: Configure shortcut keys for your most-used macros. One keystroke = status + comment + assign.
tips.ticketInternalTitle: ⚠️ Public comments go to the customer!
tips.ticketInternalDesc: The lock icon toggles Internal mode (team-only). Wrong choice = customer sees internal notes.
tips.ticketSlaDesc: Red = breached, auto-escalates to management. Respond before it turns red.
tips.ticketHandleTitle: Handle timer tracks your work time
tips.ticketHandleDesc: A timer on each ticket counts how long you work on it. Visible in agent performance reports.
tips.ticketAutoDesc: When half the SLA time passes without a reply, AI sends a confirmation to the customer. Shadow mode.
tips.ticketDraftTitle: AI Draft uses KB + similar tickets
tips.ticketDraftDesc: 'AI Draft' button generates a reply from your Knowledge Base AND similar resolved tickets. Edit and send.
tips.leadScoreDesc: Corporate email +10, C-level title +20, 'budget' in notes +10, old lead -15. A=hot, F=cold.
tips.leadConvertDesc: Convert creates Contact + Company + Deal. All lead history carries over. Don't create them manually.
tips.leadAgeDesc: Leads older than 90 days get -15 to AI score. Process leads in the first few days while they're hot.
tips.leadSourceDesc: If 'referral' converts 30% but 'website' only 5% — referral leads get +10 bonus to score.
tips.leadAssignDesc: By source, by company, round-robin — leads get assigned automatically based on your rules.
tips.contactDecayDesc: 100% weight (0-30d), 50% (30-60d), 25% (60-90d). Keep in touch or the score drops.
tips.contactWeightsDesc: Email open=3, meeting=10, deal created=15 points. Calls are worth more than emails.
tips.contactCallDesc: Click any phone number in a contact card — if VoIP is configured, the call starts automatically.
tips.contact360Desc: Emails, calls, deals, tickets, meetings — all on one card. Read it before your next call.
tips.companyChurnDesc: No activity >60d (+40pts), many tickets (+20), no deals (+15). Alert when risk >30.
tips.companySlaDesc: Assign a dedicated SLA policy per company. VIP clients get 1-hour response, others get 4 hours.
tips.companyFunnelDesc: New → Contacted → Qualified → Converted. Track the path from first touch to paying client.
tips.companyKpiDesc: Contacts, active deals, pipeline value, days as client — all calculated in real-time.
tips.taskDealTitle: Link tasks to deals for AI
tips.taskDealDesc: Linked tasks appear in the deal timeline AND boost AI win probability. Every activity counts.
tips.taskViewsDesc: Switch between views — same data, different perspective. Use what fits your workflow.
tips.taskBulkDesc: Select several tasks → change status, priority, assignee, or delete — all at once.
tips.taskCalDesc: 'Sync to Calendar' button pushes the task to Google Calendar. Works both ways.
tips.reportDrillTitle: Click funnel stages to drill down
tips.reportDrillDesc: Click any stage in the pipeline funnel → see exactly which deals are stuck there.
tips.reportForecastDesc: Forecast is based on deal probability × value. Not opinions — math from your pipeline.
tips.reportSummaryDesc: 'AI Commentary' analyzes pipeline, wins, risks — writes a 2-paragraph summary for management.
tips.campAbDesc: Create 2 email variants → AI selects winner by open rate or clicks → sends to the rest.
tips.campTrackDesc: Opens via tracking pixel, clicks via redirect. See who engaged in campaign analytics.
tips.campSegDesc: 'engagement >50 AND active <30d' — audience refreshes automatically as contacts change.
tips.campVarDesc: Test different subjects, bodies, CTAs. Holdout group receives the proven winner.
tips.journeyCondDesc: If lead status = qualified → path A, otherwise → path B. Build smart logic.
tips.journeyStatsDesc: Enrollment stats show how many contacts are at each step and where they leave.
tips.journeyTrigDesc: New lead → welcome series. Invoice paid → thank you. Ticket closed → feedback survey.
tips.segDynDesc: Dynamic = auto-updates when contacts change. Static = fixed snapshot. Use dynamic for campaigns.
tips.segCampDesc: Better targeting = higher open rates, fewer unsubscribes. Segments are your precision tool.
tips.inboxCrossDesc: Customer wrote on WhatsApp yesterday and emailed today — you see both in one thread.
tips.inboxTicketDesc: Every incoming message creates a ticket and links to the matching CRM contact.
tips.inboxDavinciDesc: AI answers from your KB, detects intent, escalates to human when needed.
tips.invRecDesc: Set frequency (monthly/quarterly) → invoices create on schedule. Perfect for subscriptions.
tips.invPartDesc: Don't wait for full payment — record partial amounts. CRM shows remaining balance and %.
tips.invJourneyDesc: Invoices overdue >7d auto-enroll in reminder journey (email → wait → email → SMS). Shadow mode.
tips.finAgingDesc: Focus collection efforts on 90+ day receivables first — they're at highest risk.
tips.finApprDesc: Create → Submit → Approve → Execute. Telegram notification on execution.
tips.finFundsDesc: Set rules once — incoming payments automatically split across funds.
tips.budgNarrDesc: 'AI Narrative' on variance chart → AI analyzes deviations and suggests actions.
tips.budgTplDesc: 'Template' button → salaries × departments × months. Saves hours of manual entry.
tips.budgRollDesc: Each month the plan adjusts based on actuals. Forecast is always up to date.
tips.profSvcDesc: Services tab shows margin for each service. Find unprofitable ones and raise prices.
tips.profOhDesc: Admin costs split by headcount ratio. No manual spreadsheet allocation needed.
tips.profAiDesc: AI: 'Salaries are >70% of costs — optimize utilization rate.' Actionable insights.
tips.projDealTitle: Link project to deal for tracking
tips.projDealDesc: Project-deal link = delivery vs revenue tracking. Without it, revenue isn't attributed.
tips.projMileDesc: Each milestone has a deadline and progress indicator. Overdue = red highlight.
tips.projBudgDesc: Budget tab tracks spending against plan. AI highlights overspending.
tips.contrExpDesc: 'Expiring Soon' shows contracts about to end. Renew before clients look elsewhere.
tips.contrMrrDesc: Monthly Recurring Revenue = sum of all active contracts. Your revenue baseline.
tips.offerChainDesc: Link offers to deals for full revenue tracking: proposal → signed → billed.
tips.offerApprDesc: Approved vs rejected ratio. Low approval? Review your pricing or value proposition.
tips.kbAiDesc: Every published article is used by AI for ticket replies and WhatsApp. More articles = smarter AI.
tips.kbPortalDesc: Published articles appear in the customer portal. Draft = team only. One button toggles.
tips.prodTitle: Products are used in offers & invoices
tips.prodDesc: Add your product catalog once — reuse in proposals and invoices. Prices auto-fill.
tips.eventsDesc: Create events → participants get invitations → synced to Google Calendar automatically.
tips.setValDesc: 'Can't move to Proposal without filling deal value' — protect your process.
tips.setPermDesc: Field permissions: hide salaries from agents, restrict deal values to managers. Per-field, per-role.
tips.macroShortDesc: Assign keyboard shortcuts to macros. Open a ticket, press Alt+1 — status changes, reply sends, tag added. All in one keystroke.
tips.macroCatDesc: Click the gear icon next to category tabs — create your own categories, rename or delete existing ones. Organize macros your way.
tips.macroOrderDesc: Macro actions execute top-to-bottom. Use the arrow buttons to reorder: set status first, then add reply, then tag.

dashboard.statsDesc: Start here every day. If revenue is down — check deals. If tickets spike — check SLA. Click any card to jump to that section.
dashboard.pipelineDesc: Click any stage to see stuck deals. If a stage is growing but deals aren't moving — your team needs to follow up.
dashboard.activityDesc: See what your team did today. No calls logged? Someone might need a nudge. Click any item to open the related deal or contact.

deals.kanbanDesc: Drag a deal card to the next column — this changes its stage and recalculates win probability. Deals stuck >7 days get flagged by AI.
deals.pipelineDesc: Use separate pipelines for different sales processes (outbound, inbound, partnerships). Each has its own stages and probabilities.
deals.summaryDesc: "Weighted" = each deal × win probability. Much lower than total? Too many weak deals in your pipeline.
deals.cardDesc: Click to open: AI will show win probability, suggest next actions, and you can create tasks without leaving the page.
deals.newDesc: Always link deals to a company and contact — this builds history that AI uses for better predictions.

dealDetail.stageDesc: Click a stage to advance. This recalculates probability. If stuck >7 days, AI will create a follow-up task for you.
dealDetail.aiPredDesc: AI scores 0-100% based on activity, deal age, and history. Below 30%? Consider a different approach. Updated automatically.
dealDetail.aiSugDesc: AI analyzed this deal and suggests specific actions. Hit 'Create Task' to commit — the task links to this deal and assigns to you.
dealDetail.quickDesc: Every call, email, and note you log feeds the AI prediction. More activity = more accurate forecast. Takes 10 seconds.
dealDetail.sidebarDesc: Watch the expected close date — if past due, AI lowers probability. Update it to keep forecasts accurate.
dealDetail.timelineDesc: Before a call, scroll here to remember what was discussed. AI uses this same history for its suggestions.

tickets.listDesc: Focus on red SLA badges first — those are breached. Then yellow. AI auto-assigns new tickets to the best available agent.
tickets.slaDesc: Yellow = approaching. Red = breached, escalates to management. AI auto-responds at 50% SLA if nobody has.
tickets.kanbanDesc: Kanban groups tickets by status. Too many in 'waiting'? Follow up with customers. Drag to change status.
tickets.newDesc: Type a subject like 'payment not working' — AI sets category to 'billing' and priority to 'high'. It's right 90% of the time.

ticketDetail.headerDesc: SLA timer counts down to your deadline. If it goes red, the ticket auto-escalates to management. Respond now to reset the clock.
ticketDetail.aiDraftDesc: AI drafts a reply from your KB + similar resolved tickets. Edit, personalize, send. Saves 5-10 min per ticket.
ticketDetail.aiSummaryDesc: Long conversation? Click for a 2-sentence summary instead of reading 20 messages. Perfect when picking up someone else's ticket.
ticketDetail.aiStepsDesc: AI suggests concrete steps: check settings, verify config, test from different browser. Follow the list to resolve systematically.
ticketDetail.commentsDesc: IMPORTANT: Public comments go to the customer! Use Internal for team discussions. Wrong choice = customer sees internal notes.
ticketDetail.macrosDesc: 'Escalate L2' = priority + reassign + note in one click. Set up yours in Settings > Macros.

leads.listDesc: Sort by AI Score to see hottest leads on top. Grade A leads convert 5x more — call them within 24 hours.
leads.scoreDesc: Score updates every 6 hours. Corporate email (+10), C-level title (+20), budget keywords (+10). Low score? Nurture via Journey instead of calling.
leads.statusDesc: Move leads: new → contacted → qualified. Pro tip: A/B-graded qualified leads should be converted immediately before they go cold.
leads.convertDesc: Convert creates Contact + Company + Deal in one action. All data carries over. Don't create them manually — you'll lose the lead history.

reports.kpiDesc: Red numbers need attention. Compare this week vs last. If conversion drops but deals increase — you're adding low-quality leads.
reports.funnelDesc: Click any stage to drill down. If Proposal has 20 deals but Negotiation has 3 — your proposals aren't converting. Review pricing or follow-up speed.
reports.leadFunnelDesc: Big drop from contacted to qualified? Qualification criteria might be too strict — or follow-up too slow. Adjust in Workflows.
reports.forecastDesc: Dashed bars = AI forecast based on pipeline probability. If forecast is below target, you need more deals or higher win rates.
reports.aiComDesc: Click 'AI Commentary' — AI analyzes pipeline, wins/losses, and churn risks, then writes a 2-paragraph executive summary. Share with your team.

inbox.channelsDesc: Filter by channel to focus: WhatsApp for quick replies, email for formal. Customer messages auto-create tickets and match to CRM contacts.
inbox.statsDesc: Track average response time. Below 1 hour = great. Above 4 hours = customers go to competitors. This feeds your SLA compliance.
inbox.convDesc: Unread count shows what needs attention. Click to see full history — including messages from other channels with the same contact.
inbox.threadDesc: Customer wrote on WhatsApp yesterday and emailed today — you see both here. Reply in the same channel they used last.

campaigns.statsDesc: Compare open rates across campaigns. Below 15%? Subject line needs work. Below 2% click rate? Content isn't compelling.
campaigns.newDesc: Create two variants and let AI pick the winner. Set test percentage (10-50%) and duration. Winner auto-sends to the rest.
campaigns.listDesc: Click any sent campaign to see opens, clicks, unsubscribes per contact. Use this data to refine your segments.

journeys.headerDesc: Stop manually sending follow-up emails. Build a chain once: trigger → email → wait 3 days → task. It runs for every new lead automatically.
journeys.listDesc: Green = running and enrolling contacts. Click to see how many people are at each step and where they drop off.
journeys.newDesc: Start simple: new lead → wait 1 day → welcome email → wait 3 days → follow-up task. Add complexity later.

segments.filtersDesc: Dynamic segments auto-update as contacts change. Use for campaigns: 'engagement > 50 AND active last 30 days' = your best audience.
segments.newDesc: Combine conditions: industry, engagement score, deal stage. Better targeting = higher open rates, fewer unsubscribes.
segments.listDesc: Contact count updates in real-time for dynamic segments. Shrinking? Engagement is dropping — time for a re-engagement campaign.

invoices.statsDesc: Watch 'Overdue' — that's money you should have. Click it to filter overdue invoices and send payment reminders.
invoices.newDesc: Always link invoices to deals — tracks revenue per deal and feeds profitability reports. Set net30/net60 to auto-calculate due dates.
invoices.listDesc: Red rows = overdue. Click to send reminders or record payments. AI auto-enrolls overdue invoices in payment reminder journeys.

finance.tabsDesc: Five modules in one place. Start with Overview for the big picture, then drill into specifics.
finance.overviewDesc: KPIs, cash flow trend, top debtors. If cash flow is negative — check Receivables tab for overdue invoices.
finance.arDesc: Aging report: current, 30d, 60d, 90+ days overdue. Focus on 90+ first — those are at risk of write-off.

budgeting.headerDesc: Budget plans track planned vs actual spending. AI highlights deviations automatically.
budgeting.newDesc: Start with annual or quarterly. Add sections (salaries, marketing, infra) and line items. Template button pre-fills common categories.
budgeting.tabsDesc: Workspace for editing, P&L for profit/loss view, Forecast for projections, Comparison to benchmark periods.

profitability.kpiDesc: Gross margin below 40%? Costs too high. Net margin below 10%? Overhead eating profits. Click any metric to drill into details.
profitability.tabsDesc: Services tab shows margin per service. Clients tab shows who's profitable. Employees tab shows cost per person. Find your loss-makers.
profitability.chartsDesc: Pie chart = cost composition. If salaries >70%, optimize utilization. AI analysis button gives detailed recommendations.

pricing.headerDesc: Rates based on your cost model + desired margin. Sliders simulate 'what if' scenarios.
pricing.tabsDesc: Model — current pricing logic. Edit — adjust rates per service. Sales — see how pricing affects deal profitability.

companies.statsDesc: Active vs inactive, lead status breakdown. Red = needs attention. Click stats to filter the list below.
companies.newDesc: Every company links to contacts, deals, tickets. The more data — the smarter AI predictions become.
companies.listDesc: Click any company to see full history: contacts, deals, invoices, timeline. Color = lead status.

companyDetail.kpiDesc: Contacts, deals, revenue, tickets — at a glance. Declining numbers? This client may be churning.
companyDetail.tabsDesc: Overview for summary, Contacts for people, Deals for pipeline, Timeline for full history, Pricing for rates.

contacts.statsDesc: Total contacts, active, with email, with phone. Low email coverage = missed campaign opportunities.
contacts.newDesc: Link to company, add phone + email. More contact data = better AI scoring and campaign targeting.

contactDetail.kpiDesc: Activity count, last contact date, engagement score. Score decays if no interaction for 30+ days.
contactDetail.commDesc: Call, email, or WhatsApp directly from here. Every interaction logs to timeline and boosts engagement score.

tasks.statsDesc: Red = overdue, needs action NOW. 'Today' shows what's due. Use 'My Tasks' toggle to focus on yours.
tasks.viewsDesc: List for detail, Kanban for workflow, Calendar for scheduling. Switch anytime — data is the same.
tasks.newDesc: Link tasks to deals or tickets — they appear in the deal timeline. Set due date for AI follow-up alerts.

taskDetail.statusDesc: Click a status button to move task forward: pending → in progress → completed. Overdue? Change date or escalate.

projects.newDesc: Connect project to a deal — this tracks delivery against revenue. Set milestones for progress checkpoints.
projects.listDesc: Color = status. Red = at risk. Click for details: tasks, milestones, budget, team members.

projectDetail.tabsDesc: Overview for KPIs, Tasks for work items, Members for team, Milestones for checkpoints, Budget for costs.

knowledgeBase.newDesc: Every article you publish here is used by AI to answer tickets and portal chat. More articles = smarter AI responses.
knowledgeBase.catDesc: Categories structure your KB. Customers see published articles in the portal. Draft = internal only.

contracts.statsDesc: Watch 'Expiring Soon' — renew before clients look elsewhere. MRR shows your recurring revenue baseline.
contracts.newDesc: Link to company + deal. Contract value feeds revenue reports and profitability calculations.

offers.statsDesc: Track approval rate: approved vs rejected. Low rate? Review pricing or value proposition.
offers.newDesc: Link to deal for conversion tracking. Offer → Contract → Invoice = full revenue chain.

settingsHub.gridDesc: All CRM settings in one place. Start with AI Automation and Workflows — they have the biggest impact.

aiAutomation.budgetDesc: Set daily limit, watch usage. If bar hits red — AI features pause until tomorrow.
aiAutomation.deliveryDesc: Configure email, Telegram, Slack delivery. Morning briefings and anomaly alerts go to all channels you set up.
aiAutomation.togglesDesc: Each AI feature has its own toggle. Start with Analytics (safe), then enable Autopilot in shadow mode.

workflows.listDesc: When X happens → do Y. Example: deal created → notify Slack + create follow-up task. Active rules run automatically.
workflows.newDesc: Pick entity (deal/ticket/lead), trigger (created/updated), conditions, and actions. Test before activating.

pipelines.headerDesc: Define stages and win probability per stage. Multiple pipelines for different sales types. Default pipeline applies to new deals.

users.listDesc: Roles control access: admin > manager > agent. Skills affect ticket auto-assignment. Availability = gets new tickets.
users.newDesc: Set role, skills, and max tickets. They'll receive daily AI briefings if admin/manager role.

slaPolicies.headerDesc: Define first response and resolution times per priority. Breaches trigger escalation rules (notifications, priority bump, reassignment).

macros.headerDesc: Macros let agents apply multiple actions to a ticket with one click: change status, add a reply, assign tags — all at once.
macros.filtersDesc: Use category tabs to quickly find the right macro. Click the gear icon to add, rename, or delete custom categories.
macros.listDesc: Each card shows what the macro does at a glance. Colored pills = actions. Click any card to edit. Toggle the switch to enable/disable.
macros.newDesc: Click here to build a macro. Pick actions from the visual builder — dropdowns for status/priority, textarea for replies. No guessing what to type.
macros.shortcutsDesc: Assign Alt+1 through Alt+9 to your most-used macros. Open any ticket, press the shortcut — all actions apply instantly.

channels.headerDesc: WhatsApp, Telegram, Facebook, email — connect here. Messages flow into Inbox and auto-create tickets.

integrations.headerDesc: Webhooks push events to external systems. API keys let other apps read/write CRM data. Scope permissions per key.

customFields.headerDesc: Add fields to any entity: text, number, date, dropdown. They appear in forms and can be used in workflow conditions.

currencies.headerDesc: Add currencies used in deals and invoices. Set exchange rates for report consolidation. One default currency for totals.

invoiceSettings.headerDesc: Set numbering format, company details, bank info, default payment terms. Applied to every new invoice automatically.

financeNotifications.headerDesc: Get Telegram/email alerts for overdue invoices, payment approvals, and upcoming deadlines. Never miss a payment again.

voip.headerDesc: Connect Twilio or 3CX. Calls log automatically to contacts, recordings attach to timeline. Click-to-call from any contact.

fieldPermissions.headerDesc: Control field visibility per role. Hide salary data from agents, restrict deal values to managers. Read vs write per field.

organization.headerDesc: Company name and logo appear in emails, invoices, and portal. Branding colors customize the CRM look.

billing.headerDesc: Current subscription, user/contact limits, renewal date. Upgrade to increase limits and unlock features.

security.headerDesc: Enable 2FA for all users — blocks 99% of unauthorized access. Set password complexity rules.

auditLog.headerDesc: Every action logged: who changed what, when. Filter by user, action type, or date. Essential for compliance.

portalUsers.headerDesc: Manage portal access. Customers create tickets, read KB, chat with AI — reducing your support load.

customDomains.headerDesc: Point your domain to the CRM portal. Customers see your brand, not ours. SSL certificates auto-configured.

dashboardSettings.headerDesc: Toggle widgets on/off. Show what matters to your role — sales see pipeline, support sees tickets, finance sees AR.

dashboardSettings.title: Dashboard Settings
dashboardSettings.subtitle: Choose widgets and customize your dashboard

dashboardWidgets.title: Dashboard Widgets
dashboardWidgets.subtitle: Toggle widgets on/off — changes are saved automatically
dashboardWidgets.risksBannerDesc: Low margin, unprofitable customers, overdue tasks, at-risk contracts
dashboardWidgets.statCardsDesc: Revenue, leads, deals, conversion, tickets, campaigns
dashboardWidgets.leadSourcesDesc: Donut chart of leads by source

escalationRules.title: Escalation Rules
escalationRules.subtitle: Configure automatic escalation when SLA deadlines are breached
escalationRules.noRulesDesc: Create rules to automatically escalate tickets when SLA deadlines are missed. Rules can notify managers, increase priority, or reassign tickets.
escalationRules.ruleNamePlaceholder: e.g. L1 - Notify manager on first response breach
escalationRules.minutesBeforeHint: How many minutes before the SLA deadline to trigger this rule
escalationRules.minutesAfterHint: 0 = immediately on breach, or set delay in minutes after breach

leadRules.title: Lead Assignment Rules
leadRules.subtitle: Automated lead routing based on conditions or round-robin
leadRules.noRulesDesc: Create rules to automatically route leads to the right team members
leadRules.name: Name

pitchLinks.title: Pitch Links
pitchLinks.subtitle: Create and manage one-time presentation links
pitchLinks.noLinks: No links have been created yet
pitchLinks.linkReady: Link is ready! Copy and send it:
pitchLinks.linkOneTimeWarning: This link can only be used once. When the page is closed, the link will be automatically deactivated.

quotas.title: Quota Management
quotas.subtitle: Sales quotas by managers and quarters

ticketQueues.title: Ticket Queues
ticketQueues.subtitle: Configure skill-based routing queues for automatic ticket assignment
ticketQueues.noQueuesDesc: Create ticket queues to enable skill-based routing. Tickets will be automatically assigned to agents with matching skills.
ticketQueues.skillsHint: Match ticket categories to agent skills. Leave empty for a catch-all queue.

portal.title: Client Portal
portal.loginSubtitle: Sign in to manage tickets and get support
portal.registerSubtitle: Enter your email to receive a registration link
portal.followLink: Follow the link in the email
portal.hasAccount: Already have an account? Sign in
portal.contactAdmin: Contact your administrator to activate portal access
portal.createPasswordSubtitle: Create a password for portal access
portal.noTickets: No tickets yet. Create one to get started
portal.chatError: An error occurred. Please try again.

segments.title: Segments
segments.subtitle: Contact groups for targeted campaigns and analytics
segments.noSegmentsHint: Create your first segment to group contacts
segments.pageDescription: Audience segments: group contacts by criteria for targeted campaigns
segments.hintDynamic: Segments that auto-update based on matching criteria
segments.hintStatic: Manually curated segments with fixed contact lists

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.pageDescription: Notifications: system alerts about deals, tasks, tickets and other events

emailTemplates.title: Email Templates
emailTemplates.subtitle: Create reusable email templates for campaigns
emailTemplates.subject: Subject
emailTemplates.pageDescription: Email templates: reusable message templates with variables for campaigns and notifications
emailTemplates.hintColSubject: Email subject line that recipients will see
emailTemplates.hintColCategory: Template category: Welcome, Onboarding, Marketing, Follow-up, etc.
emailTemplates.editorHint: Use the toolbar for formatting and variables for personalization
emailTemplates.templateLibraryHint: Choose a pre-built template to get started

emailLog.title: Email Log
emailLog.subtitle: History of all sent and received emails
emailLog.pageDescription: Email log: history of all sent and received emails with delivery status
emailLog.hintTotalEmails: Total number of email records in the log
emailLog.hintOutbound: Emails sent from the system to external recipients
emailLog.hintColStatus: Delivery status: Pending, Sent, Delivered, Failed, Bounced

journeys.title: Customer Journeys
journeys.subtitle: Automation sequences for customer engagement
journeys.pageDescription: Customer journeys: automate multi-step workflows triggered by events
journeys.hintActiveJourneys: Journeys currently running and processing contacts
journeys.hintTotalEntries: Total contacts that entered all journeys
journeys.hintCompletionRate: Percentage of contacts who completed the full journey
journeys.templateHint: Start with a template or build from scratch
journeys.templateWelcomeDesc: Greet new leads with emails and tasks
journeys.templateNurtureDesc: Multi-step email sequence to warm up leads
journeys.templateBlankDesc: Start from scratch with full control
journeys.segmentHint: Only contacts matching this segment will enter the journey
journeys.emailBodyPlaceholder: Hello, {{contact_name}}! We are glad to welcome you...
journeys.smsTextPlaceholder: Hello! Your request has been received...
journeys.searchByNameEmailCompany: Search by name, email or company

fieldPermissions.title: Field Permissions
fieldPermissions.description: Control visibility and editability of fields per role. Admin always has full access.
fieldPermissions.noRules: No sharing rules configured. By default, users see only their own records.
fieldPermissions.ruleNameHint: Give the rule a name so it's easy to identify
fieldPermissions.entityTypeHint: Which type of records will this rule apply to?
fieldPermissions.sourceRoleHint: Records owned by users in this role will be visible to the target role
fieldPermissions.targetRoleHint: Users in this role will see the source role's records
fieldPermissions.accessLevelHint: What level of access will the target role have?
fieldPermissions.ruleDescriptionPlaceholder: Briefly describe the purpose of this rule (optional)
fieldPermissions.deleteRuleConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this sharing rule?

faq.sectionSubtitle: Can't find an answer? Contact us.
faq.a1: Yes! Start with a 14-day free trial on any plan. No credit card required.
faq.q2: How is LeadDrive different from Salesforce or HubSpot?
faq.a2: LeadDrive includes a built-in cost model engine, profitability analytics and budgeting/P&L — features competitors either lack or charge extra for. Plus, our Da Vinci agents are built-in, not add-ons.
faq.q3: Can I migrate data from another CRM?
faq.a3: Absolutely. We support CSV/Excel import and have migration scripts for popular CRMs. Our team can assist with complex migrations.
faq.a4: The platform supports Azerbaijani, Russian and English. More languages are on the roadmap.
faq.a5: Yes. We use PostgreSQL with full encryption, role-based access control, 2FA, audit logging and complete data isolation for each organization.
faq.q6: Can I customize the CRM for my industry?
faq.a6: Yes. Custom fields, workflow automation, configurable dashboards and dynamic pricing allow you to adapt LeadDrive to any business model.
faq.a7: Currently we offer cloud deployment. On-premise options are available for Enterprise customers — contact our sales team.
faq.a8: Connect your Email, SMS, Telegram, WhatsApp, Facebook, Instagram and VK accounts. All messages appear in a unified inbox with conversation threads per contact.

privacy.p1: LeadDrive Inc. ("Company", "we") respects the privacy of users ("you") of the LeadDrive CRM platform. This Privacy Policy explains how your personal data is collected, used and protected.
privacy.p2: The following data is collected during platform use:
privacy.p2_l1: Registration data: name, email, phone, company name
privacy.p2_l2: Usage data: login times, features used, browser type
privacy.p2_l3: Business data: data created within the platform (companies, contacts, deals)
privacy.p2_l4: Technical data: IP address, device type, operating system
privacy.p2_l5: Platform integration data (Meta, Facebook, Instagram): Page IDs, post and media metadata, comment text, commenter public display names, and OAuth access tokens — collected only for tenants who explicitly connect these accounts
privacy.p3: Collected data is used for the following purposes:
privacy.p3_l2: Managing your account and providing support
privacy.p4: All data is stored in an encrypted PostgreSQL database. Full data isolation is provided for each organization (multi-tenant architecture). Role-based access control and audit logging record every change. OAuth access tokens for connected platforms (Meta, Facebook, Instagram) are stored AES-256-GCM encrypted at rest and scoped to a single tenant.
privacy.p5: Your personal data is not sold or rented to third parties. Data is shared only with trusted partners when necessary for service delivery (hosting, email service).
privacy.p6: Our platform uses functional cookies (login session, language preference). Analytical cookies are activated only with your consent.
privacy.p7_l1: Request access to your personal data
privacy.p7_l2: Request correction or deletion of your data
privacy.p8: Tenants can connect their Facebook Pages and linked Instagram Business accounts through OAuth. When connected, we use the Meta Graph API to access:
privacy.p8_l1: Page and post metadata (IDs, timestamps, captions, permalinks)
privacy.p8_l2: Comments on the tenant's posts and public mentions, including the commenter's public display name and profile picture URL
privacy.p8_l3: Tagged media shared publicly with the connected Page or Instagram account
privacy.p8_l4: OAuth access tokens (stored AES-256-GCM encrypted, scoped to one tenant, never shared across tenants)
privacy.p8_usage: This data is used only for the connecting tenant's Social Monitoring inbox, AI sentiment classification, and one-click conversion into CRM Leads, Tickets, or Tasks. We do not post on the tenant's behalf without explicit operator action, do not access Pages the tenant does not administer, and do not use the data for advertising lookalikes or third-party sharing.
privacy.p8_deletion: Tenants can disconnect at any time from Settings → Integrations, which revokes OAuth tokens and purges cached platform data within 30 days. Individual users whose public comments have been ingested may request erasure — see our Data Deletion Instructions for details.

dataDeletion.title: Data Deletion Instructions
dataDeletion.intro: This page explains how you can request deletion of the personal data LeadDrive CRM holds about you, including data collected through integrations with Meta (Facebook, Instagram).
dataDeletion.p1: These instructions apply to three groups:
dataDeletion.p1_l1: Tenant account owners and users — individuals and organizations who hold a LeadDrive CRM account
dataDeletion.p1_l2: End customers of a tenant — contacts, leads, and ticket reporters stored in a tenant's CRM workspace
dataDeletion.p1_l3: Public commenters on connected Meta platforms — Facebook or Instagram users whose public comments have been ingested into a tenant's Social Monitoring inbox
dataDeletion.p2_l1: Registration and profile data (name, email, phone, password hash)
dataDeletion.p2_l2: Business records created in the platform (companies, contacts, deals, tickets, tasks, invoices)
dataDeletion.p2_l3: Meta / Facebook / Instagram data: cached Page metadata, posts, comments, commenter public names and profile picture URLs, tagged media references
dataDeletion.p2_l4: OAuth access tokens and refresh tokens for connected Meta accounts
dataDeletion.p2_l5: Audit log entries and activity history tied to the requesting identifier
dataDeletion.p3_l1_body: If you are a tenant admin, log into app.leaddrivecrm.org → Settings → Integrations → Disconnect Facebook / Instagram. This immediately revokes tokens and queues cached platform data for deletion.
dataDeletion.p3_l2_body: Tenant owners can request full account closure from Settings → Organization → Close Account. All tenant data is deleted within 30 days.
dataDeletion.p3_l3_body: Send an email to {email} with subject "Data Deletion Request". Include: (a) the identifier to delete (email address, Facebook user ID, or the URL of the public comment), (b) which tenant workspace the data lives in, if known. We reply within 5 business days and complete deletion within 30 days.
dataDeletion.p4: We complete deletion requests within 30 calendar days of receipt. Encrypted database backups that may contain residual copies are rotated and purged within 90 days. OAuth tokens are revoked immediately upon disconnect.
dataDeletion.p5: Deleting your data from LeadDrive CRM does not remove the original content from Facebook, Instagram, or any other external platform — you must delete that content in the original platform separately. We also retain minimal records required by law (e.g., tax invoices) for the statutory period; these are isolated and not used for any other purpose.
dataDeletion.p6: If you disconnected our app directly from your Facebook account settings, Meta sends us a signed data-deletion request. We process it automatically within 30 days, revoke tokens, and purge all cached Meta data tied to your user ID. A confirmation URL is returned to Meta so you can verify completion.
dataDeletion.p7: For data deletion questions or to request a status update on a submitted request, contact us:

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.p1: These Terms of Service govern the use of the LeadDrive CRM platform ("Service") provided by LeadDrive Inc. ("Company"). By using the Service, you accept these terms.
terms.p2: LeadDrive CRM is a cloud-based customer relationship management platform. The Service includes sales, marketing, support, finance and analytics modules.
terms.p3_l1: You must provide accurate and up-to-date information during registration
terms.p3_l2: You are responsible for account security
terms.p3_l3: You may not transfer your account to third parties
terms.p3_l4: Users under 18 may not use the Service
terms.p4_l1: Payment is made via bank transfer or card
terms.p4_l4: Cancellation takes effect at the end of the current billing period
terms.p5: All data you create on the platform (companies, contacts, deals, invoices, etc.) is your property. You can export your data upon subscription cancellation.
terms.p6_l1: Using the platform for illegal purposes
terms.p6_l2: Attempting to breach the service's security
terms.p6_l3: Unauthorized access to other users' data
terms.p6_l4: Reverse engineering or copying the platform
terms.p7: We target 99.9% uptime, but short interruptions may occur during maintenance or emergencies. Scheduled maintenance is announced in advance.
terms.p8: The Company is not liable for indirect damages arising from use of the Service. Liability for direct damages is limited to the subscription fee paid.
terms.p9: These terms may be updated from time to time. Significant changes will be communicated via email. Continued use of the Service after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.
